# Timeline

A vertical timeline component for displaying a sequence of events or steps in chronological order.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  Timeline,
  TimelineItem,
  TimelineConnector,
  TimelineSeparator,
  TimelineIndicator,
  TimelineContent,
  TimelineTitle,
  TimelineDescription,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Timeline` | The root timeline container. |
| `TimelineItem` | A single event/step in the timeline. |
| `TimelineSeparator` | The vertical connector area between items. |
| `TimelineConnector` | The line connecting timeline items. |
| `TimelineIndicator` | The dot or icon indicator for each item. |
| `TimelineContent` | The content area for each timeline item. |
| `TimelineTitle` | The title of a timeline event. |
| `TimelineDescription` | The description text of a timeline event. |

## Props

### Timeline

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `string` | - | The visual style variant of the timeline. |
| `size` | `string` | `"md"` | The size of the timeline indicators and connectors. |

## Usage

### Basic Timeline

```jsx
<Timeline>
  <TimelineItem>
    <TimelineSeparator>
      <TimelineIndicator />
      <TimelineConnector />
    </TimelineSeparator>
    <TimelineContent>
      <TimelineTitle>Order Placed</TimelineTitle>
      <TimelineDescription>January 15, 2026</TimelineDescription>
    </TimelineContent>
  </TimelineItem>
  <TimelineItem>
    <TimelineSeparator>
      <TimelineIndicator />
      <TimelineConnector />
    </TimelineSeparator>
    <TimelineContent>
      <TimelineTitle>Shipped</TimelineTitle>
      <TimelineDescription>January 17, 2026</TimelineDescription>
    </TimelineContent>
  </TimelineItem>
  <TimelineItem>
    <TimelineSeparator>
      <TimelineIndicator />
    </TimelineSeparator>
    <TimelineContent>
      <TimelineTitle>Delivered</TimelineTitle>
      <TimelineDescription>January 20, 2026</TimelineDescription>
    </TimelineContent>
  </TimelineItem>
</Timeline>
```

### Timeline with Custom Indicators

```jsx
import { LuCheck, LuPackage, LuTruck } from "react-icons/lu";

<Timeline>
  <TimelineItem>
    <TimelineSeparator>
      <TimelineIndicator>
        <LuPackage />
      </TimelineIndicator>
      <TimelineConnector />
    </TimelineSeparator>
    <TimelineContent>
      <TimelineTitle>Order Packed</TimelineTitle>
    </TimelineContent>
  </TimelineItem>
  <TimelineItem>
    <TimelineSeparator>
      <TimelineIndicator>
        <LuTruck />
      </TimelineIndicator>
      <TimelineConnector />
    </TimelineSeparator>
    <TimelineContent>
      <TimelineTitle>In Transit</TimelineTitle>
    </TimelineContent>
  </TimelineItem>
  <TimelineItem>
    <TimelineSeparator>
      <TimelineIndicator>
        <LuCheck />
      </TimelineIndicator>
    </TimelineSeparator>
    <TimelineContent>
      <TimelineTitle>Delivered</TimelineTitle>
    </TimelineContent>
  </TimelineItem>
</Timeline>
```
